description_long: This community center complex is composed of several low-rise buildings arranged around a central courtyard with outdoor seating and landscaping. The buildings feature flat and gently sloped roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and brick-red facades. The site is integrated with paved roads, sidewalks, and numerous trees, creating a welcoming and accessible environment. The central courtyard appears to be a gathering space, possibly for events or recreation, with benches and tables visible. The surrounding structures include what look like administrative offices, multipurpose rooms, and possibly a small parking area. The overall layout is open and organized, with clear pathways and green spaces enhancing the urban setting.
description: A multi-building community center complex with a central courtyard, paved roads, and landscaped green areas, featuring modern low-rise architecture and outdoor gathering spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the community center from above, highlighting the central courtyard, surrounding buildings, and tree-lined streets.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the main entrance area, parking, and the arrangement of buildings around the courtyard.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side view, displaying the length of the main building, the courtyard, and the alignment of adjacent structures.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear and side of the complex, with a focus on the tree-lined access road and the back entrances of the buildings.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance appears to be located on the building facing the central courtyard, accessible via paved walkways. The entrance is wide and likely features glass doors, but no ramps, steps, or automatic doors are clearly visible. The design is integrated with the modern, minimalist architecture of the complex.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on open, functional spaces and integration with landscaped outdoor areas.
